IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT [name] FROM sys.database_principals WHERE [name] =  'Outsystems_admin') 
         BEGIN CREATE USER [Outsystems_admin] FOR LOGIN [Outsystems_admin] WITH DEFAULT_SCHEMA = [dbo] END
         ELSE BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT * from master.dbo.syslogins WHERE loginname =  'Outsystems_admin') ALTER USER [Outsystems_admin] WITH LOGIN = [Outsystems_admin] ELSE IF '[Outsystems_admin]' NOT IN ('[dbo]','[guest]')  DROP USER [Outsystems_admin] END;

-- [-- DB ROLES --] --
EXEC sp_addrolemember @rolename = 'db_owner', @membername = 'COFIDIS2000\outs1'
EXEC sp_addrolemember @rolename = 'db_owner', @membername = 'sa_trans'
EXEC sp_addrolemember @rolename = 'db_owner', @membername = 'sa_Runtime'
